PHASE: **(admin-bounce-prefix-symmetry) SHIPPED 2026-05-22 PM on `feat/admin-bounce-prefix-symmetry`** — Tier 1 cosmetic ticket filed by [[rule-16-cleanup-2026-05-22]] closes the last open Tier 1 from that queue. Pre-fix: host visits `/t/system/admin` → middleware rewrites to `/admin` → admin/layout.tsx RBAC fails → `redirect("/app")` → browser lands at bare `/app`, dropping `/t/system/` prefix. Post-fix: middleware sets new `x-tenant-path-prefix` header on `wasPathStripped` (value `/t/{slug}`; empty on subdomain pattern); RSC layouts/pages read the header via `next/headers` and route the target through new pure helper `buildTenantBouncePath(target, prefix)` in `apps/web/src/server/tenant-redirect.ts` before calling `redirect(...)`. All 3 symmetric bounce sites updated: admin/layout.tsx (host RBAC + auth fallback), superadmin/layout.tsx (non-platform + auth fallback), app/call/[id]/page.tsx (invalid-callId + auth fallback). 6 source files / 132 insertions / 7 deletions. 8 RED→GREEN tests on the pure helper (270 → 278 ✓). pnpm lint ✓ 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings unchanged) / typecheck ✓ 0 errors across 8 packages / test 278/278 ✓ / build ✓ Middleware 141 kB UNCHANGED (Edge surface stable per [[instrumentation-edge-stub-required]] — MANDATORY since middleware was touched) / audit --audit-level=critical ✓ exit 0 (1 HIGH pre-documented per [[nodemailer-cve-mitigation]]). Two-stage review (Rule 25) PASS: Stage 1 spec — prefix preserved on all 3 RSC bounce sites (locked by test cases 2, 3, 6); subdomain pattern unchanged (test case 1); callbackUrl preserved through helper (test case 5). Stage 2 quality — zero `any`; TDD RED (8/8 failing on `buildTenantBouncePath is not a function`) → GREEN (8/8 passing post-impl) evidenced in vitest output; blast radius = 6 files matching plan exactly; conventional commit; helper is single-responsibility; no repeated logic — 3 consumer sites all call same helper. Inline Opus 4.7 controller (Tier 1; ~45K context). Skipped vercel-plugin auto-suggestions throughout: next-forge / auth / routing-middleware / nextjs proxy.ts / next-cache-components per Rule 28 + established skip-list precedent (all false positives or deferred to `next-upgrade` ticket — Yelli runs Next.js 15.5.18, not 16). Architecture reuses the established header-bridge pattern between Edge middleware and Node RSC ([[guest-meeting-layout-bypass]] precedent).
